---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for the office
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The idea**
What you'd like the office to do.

**Why**
The problem it solves or the delight it adds.

**Which surface**
Office canvas · kanban · binder · comms · daemon/spine · agent helper · other.

**Notes**
Anything about how it might fit the "one typed spine, many clients" model
(see `CONTRACT.md`) — especially if it touches the daemon or the bus.
